HGSS.648.0001:
Huh? I can’t hear you. I think we’ve
got a bad connection.\f
Go somewhere else and call again!
HGSS.648.0002:
Hello...
What’s up?\r
I’m doing great!\f
HGSS.648.0003:
Hmm... I’d like to battle you again, but
I think there’re some Gyms that you\r
haven’t visited yet, aren’t there?
HGSS.648.0004:
I can take a break on Saturday
evenings, if you want to give me a call\r
again then.
HGSS.648.0005:
Hey, you called at just the right time!
I’m free right now.\r
Want to battle me again? [0200,0000]
HGSS.648.0006:
All right, all right!
I’m looking forward to it!\f
I’ll meet you at the Fighting Dojo in
Saffron City!\f
I won’t be at the Pewter Gym, all right?
Don’t get confused!
HGSS.648.0007:
Is that so...
Well, I suppose you must have a lot of\r
things to do yourself...
HGSS.648.0008:
Yeah, I’d really like to battle with you
again... But I think you’ve got an\r
appointment with someone else?\f
Once you’ve taken care of your
obligations with other Trainers,\r
then call me again!
HGSS.648.0009:
I’ll be waiting for you to arrive at
the Fighting Dojo in Saffron City.\r
It’s a promise between Trainers!
HGSS.648.0010:
This is Brock.
Oh hey, how are you doing?\f
HGSS.648.0011:
We made plans to battle at the Fighting
Dojo in Saffron City, didn’t we?\r
You didn’t forget, did you?
HGSS.648.0012:
A large earthquake struck recently.
Some of the walls in my Gym\r
crumbled a bit.\f
Well, I guess that’s just the kind of
thing my Gym’s known for.\f
So even if the walls crumbled a bit,
nobody would really notice!
HGSS.648.0013:
There are so many different types of
Pokémon in the world. As you could\r
guess, I like Rock-type Pokémon best.\f
They’re solid and rough, and yet
somewhat brittle at the same time.\r
Once you’ve really gotten to know\r
them, they’re even quite cute.\f
What do you think?
HGSS.648.0014:
Every town’s Pokémon Gym is different!
The design, the tricks, everything is so\r
different. It’s interesting!\f
Each Gym Leader assigned to take care
of a Gym by the Pokémon League gets to\r
design as they please.\f
Of course, Pewter Gym’s design is my
pride and joy!\f
The tricks aren’t much, but you can’t
deny that when you enter, the design\r
has a breathtaking impact, right?
